title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Sharekhan

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Sharekhan
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Sharekhan in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan:
Sharekhan is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan!
